name: Social Growth
description: Social and brand domains with monthly marketing review workflow

globalFacts.title: Social Growth Goal
globalFacts.content: Grow engaged social audience and maintain consistent brand publishing cadence.

instructions.title: Social Review Instructions
instructions.content: Compare follower growth, posting cadence, and engagement by platform.

facts.title: Posting Cadence Target
facts.content: Publish at least 12 social posts per month across active platforms.

instructions.title: Brand Alignment Instructions
instructions.content: Evaluate whether observed social activity aligns with brand cadence targets.

facts.title: Social Strategy Goal
facts.content: Translate social performance into audience and engagement growth priorities.

instructions.title: Social Strategy Planning
instructions.content: Align social findings with the social growth goal.

workflows.name: Monthly Marketing Review
workflows.description: Social and brand marketing health review
